project: SISO - API de Separação (Bip, Lista, Undo, Expedir)
description: API endpoints for order separation: list orders by galpão, process barcode scan (bip), undo bip, mark as shipped, force pending. All session-protected.

userStories.title: GET /api/separacao — list orders by galpão with items and bip state
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to fetch orders assigned to my galpão with their items and bip progress so that the frontend can display the separation queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/route.ts with GET handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) from src/lib/session.ts — return 401 if invalid
Accept query param status to filter by status_separacao (aguardando_nf, pendente, em_separacao, embalado, expedido)
Filter pedidos by separacao_galpao_id = session user's galpaoId
Admin (galpaoId null) can pass ?galpao_id=UUID to filter; return 400 if admin calls without galpao_id
Exclude pedidos with status = 'cancelado'
Join siso_pedido_itens for item data: produto_id, sku, gtin, descricao, quantidade_pedida, quantidade_bipada, bipado_completo
Resolve localizacao from siso_pedido_item_estoques filtered by empresas in the operator's galpão
Return array of pedidos with nested itens[], ordered by data ASC
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: POST /api/separacao/bipar — process barcode scan
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to scan a barcode (GTIN or SKU) to confirm I picked the correct item, with the server processing the bip atomically.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/bipar/route.ts with POST handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) — return 401 { error: 'sessao_invalida' } if invalid
Apply rate limiting via checkBipRateLimit(sessionId) — return 429 { error: 'rate_limit' } if exceeded
Accept body { codigo: string } (SKU or GTIN)
Call supabase.rpc('siso_processar_bip', { p_codigo: codigo, p_usuario_id: session.id, p_galpao_id: session.galpaoId })

Map PL/pgSQL return status to HTTP responses: 'parcial' → 200, 'item_completo' → 200, 'pedido_completo' → 200, 'nao_encontrado' → 404 { error: 'item_nao_encontrado', codigo }, 'ja_completo' → 409 { error: 'item_ja_completo', pedido_id, sku }
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: POST /api/separacao/desfazer-bip — undo a bip
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to undo a mistaken bip to correct errors without calling an admin.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/desfazer-bip/route.ts with POST handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) — return 401 if invalid
Accept body { pedido_id: string, produto_id: number }
Validate pedido belongs to operator's galpão (separacao_galpao_id = session.galpaoId) — return 403 if not
Decrement quantidade_bipada by 1 (minimum 0) on the matching siso_pedido_itens row
If quantidade_bipada < quantidade_pedida after decrement, set bipado_completo = false
If pedido status_separacao = 'embalado' after undo, revert to 'em_separacao' and clear embalado_em and etiqueta_status
If pedido status_separacao = 'em_separacao' and SUM(quantidade_bipada) across all items = 0, revert to 'pendente' and clear separado_por and separado_em
Return updated item state and pedido status_separacao
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: POST /api/separacao/expedir — mark orders as shipped
userStories.description: As an operator, I need to mark packed orders as shipped to move them out of the active separation queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/expedir/route.ts with POST handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) — return 401 if invalid
Accept body { pedido_ids: string[] }
Validate all pedidos belong to operator's galpão — return 403 if any don't
Validate all pedidos have status_separacao = 'embalado' — return 400 with list of invalid pedido_ids if not
UPDATE siso_pedidos SET status_separacao = 'expedido' WHERE id IN (pedido_ids) AND status_separacao = 'embalado'
Return { updated: number } with count of updated rows
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: PATCH /api/separacao/{pedidoId}/forcar-pendente — admin force pending
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to force an order from aguardando_nf to pendente when the NF webhook fails, so the order can proceed to separation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/app/api/separacao/[pedidoId]/forcar-pendente/route.ts with PATCH handler
Validate session via getSessionUser(request) — return 401 if invalid
Validate session user cargo = 'admin' — return 403 if not admin
Validate pedido exists and has status_separacao = 'aguardando_nf' — return 400 if not
UPDATE siso_pedidos SET status_separacao = 'pendente' WHERE id = pedidoId AND status_separacao = 'aguardando_nf'
Return { success: true, pedido_id: pedidoId }
Typecheck passes
